# Pull Request Checklist

## What changed?

-

## Data and ethics

- [ ] This does not add sensitive individual human data.
- [ ] Data access tier is declared.
- [ ] Human, neonatal, fertility, or genetics data has ethics status documented.
- [ ] Units and landmarks are defined.
- [ ] Citations or provenance are included.
- [ ] License is included.

## Validation

- [ ] `dmatlas validate` passes.
- [ ] `dmatlas report` passes.
- [ ] Tests pass.
